narrative:
Marion East (precinct in Mercer County) has 1,176 registered voters, with 43.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 52.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 48.8 percentage points.
